creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
The link in PR misses a question-mark between 'php?thread', right link is:
"http://sourceforge.net/mailarchive/forum.php?thread_name=op.uz5twqusz11dgt%40debian&forum_name=vda-users"

BTW I tested VDA 2.6.5 patch for a week. Works fine for me.
Original (buggy) version of the VDA patch is no more available.
